description.value:
Adeptus Administratum

The Adeptus Administratum is the bureaucratic heart of the Imperium, an immense organisation responsible for the governance, taxation, census, and logistical oversight of a million worlds. Its adepts are clerks, scribes, logisticians, and administrators — those who keep the wheels of the Imperium turning through mountains of data-slates and oceans of parchment. Though often overlooked, an Administratum agent possesses invaluable skills in investigation, record-keeping, and social manipulation.

Background Aptitudes

Knowledge, Social

Starting Skills

Commerce, Common Lore (Administratum), Linguistics (High Gothic)

Starting Talent

Weapon Training (Las) or Weapon Training (Solid Projectile)

Background Bonus

Master of Paperwork: An Administratum character counts as having the Peer (Adeptus Administratum) Talent for all social interactions with members of the Administratum. They also gain a +10 bonus to Requisition Tests.

specialAbilities.name: Master of Paperwork
